title: Prefilling View with Single Item
excerpt: The CEO wants every board to display the first 16 columns of the originating Board. I want to make this info easily available without the user having to scroll through 16 columns to get to the actual functionality of the…

posts.author: Sue_Menard (Sue Menard)
posts.cookedHtml:
The CEO wants every board to display the first 16 columns of the originating Board. I want to make this info easily available without the user having to scroll through 16 columns to get to the actual functionality of the Board.

I can set up a separate view called Project Info to show just those 16 columns. However, if the user has to search for the item name the CEO won’t approve.
Is there a way to select an item on the default view and when the user clicks on the Project Info view just that item will appear in the view?

Many thanks
Sue

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sue,

If I am understanding correctly, you can set up a filter in that specific board view that filters to that item, this way upon selecting that project info view, only that item will appear.

Does this help?
